solution The problem requires reordering an array to meet a specific pattern. solution The pattern is such that elements alternate between less than or equal to and greater than or equal to their neighbors. solution The key is to ensure adjacent elements are not equal if possible.

solution The first step is to sort the array to facilitate the pattern. solution Then, we rearrange elements by placing larger numbers at even indices and smaller at odd indices. solution This method ensures the wiggle pattern is maintained.
